APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JACK PRAETZELLIS of Fox Rothschild, LLP, Tel No. (415) 364-5540 appearing for Plaintiff Puccini Consulting Design & Development, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PUCCINI CONSULTING DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT, INC.'S Application For Right To Attach Order and Writ of Attachment as to Defendant 500 S. Ervay Alterra, LLC aka Alterra 500 South Ervay, LLC is granted. The Court finds that all necessary requirements for the requested relief have been satisfied. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
